title: Acadia (ACAD) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, '23 View Up
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals reported better-than-expected second-quarter 2023 results, raising its financial guidance for the year. ACAD was set to give its latest quarterly earnings report on August 2, 2023. Analysts estimated ACADIA Pharmaceuticals would report an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.12. The company ultimately beat expectations, reporting better-than-expected second-quarter 2023 results and raising its financial guidance for the year. NUPLAZID revenues showed strong momentum in Q2 2023. DAYBUE continued its rapid uptake following its 2023 FDA approval for Rett syndrome. The company provided updates on its pipeline, including the planned Phase II ACP-204 (remlifanserin) study for Alzheimer's disease psychosis. Acadia's 2023 earnings guidance was raised based on the strong Q2 performance and positive trends in both marketed products.
